_about: Example labeled set for `npm run eval`. Fully fictional demo world — NO real persona. Copy to retrieval_cases.json (gitignored) and label your OWN store. Labeling is by KEYWORD: a returned doc counts as relevant iff its title/summary/content contains any listed keyword (case-insensitive). `kind` is a free-form bucket for the per-category breakdown. `expectNone` = negative control (must return nothing). `expectAll` = whole-picture coverage (set-recall). `scope:"full"` cases only run with `npm run eval -- scope=full` (they target the observation/profile/RESTRICTED pool).

cases._note: literal CJK token must be found by the lexical arm even with weak embeddings
alias should bridge to the canonical entity via the entity-name ILIKE

cases.query: what does the user care about at work

cases._note: no shared keyword with the doc title — pure semantic recall

cases.query: who does the user climb with
cases._note: answer requires linking person ↔ activity across two docs
many docs mention 'coffee'; the specific preference must rank first
irrelevant query — top scope must return nothing (SEM_FLOOR guards it)

cases.query: assistant's own note about ranking quality
cases._note: SELF memory lives in the full-scope pool only
RESTRICTED pool is only reachable in full scope (public surfaces gate exposure separately)

cases.query: what pets does the user have
cases._note: whole-picture: BOTH pets must come back, not just the top-ranked one
